text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm walking around the academy, I
hear a familiar voice.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
T-Tachyon, you shouldn't rely solely on snacks.
Please, you need to eat a proper meal...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I do not. In most circumstances, snacks
are, in fact, the most efficient and convenient
method of receiving nutrients.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ah, perfect timing. You agree with me, right?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: W-wait! I made lunch for you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nishino Flower holds out a lunch box and takes
off the lid to reveal a variety of colorful foods
packed inside it.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm. Well, then...
choice_data_list: The side dishes are so cute.
The side dishes are so cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm. Well, then...
choice_data_list: The side dishes are so cute.
The side dishes are so cute.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haha! Are those carrots cut into hearts and stars?
You even made the hot dog sausages look like
octopuses.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What wholly incomprehensible shapes! But they're
utterly fascinating!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Aw... I thought my hot dog octopuses looked
tasty...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I see... So you were trying to see how the
taste of food is altered according to its visual
presentation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Consider my curiosity piqued. I shall lend you my
assistance in this noble research!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, if that means you'll eat it, then that's all that
matters... ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This meal appears to have an excess of beta
carotene. This is surely more than the daily
required amount.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I boiled the carrots whole since I
heard you lose fewer nutrients that way.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I also stewed them in a sweet sauce hoping it
would be to your liking, ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That is a sensible cooking method indeed. I have
no qualms about your considerations for my
palate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, it appears proper meals really do possess
benefits that differ from portable snacks. This
calls for further research!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
U-um! It would be wonderful if you ate more of
this... For "further research," that is!
